'''Lenri Darv''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planetary]] [[Customs official/Legends|customs official]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Corrupt and greedy, Darv often accepted bribes to allow illegal cargo to pass through the [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]].
